strengths: ~14 years of polyglot full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Track record of founding and sustaining an open-source platform (GISCollective)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or research credentials
Career level is Senior/Staff IC, not Director/Principal scope or strategic advisory
No advanced degree and no evidence of advising strategic customers or cloud platform strategy

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and shipped AI products

response.justification: The role demands a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, cloud platform strategy fluency, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers. The résumé shows a strong hands-on senior/staff engineer with broad full-stack and some embedded experience, plus recent MCP/agent tooling work at re:cinq — but no shipped AI products, no ML research, no Master's/PhD, and no evidence of strategic advisory or platform-level leadership. Tenure is roughly 14 years, just shy of the 15-year minimum, and the trajectory is IC delivery rather than the cross-org influence this role requires.
